packets.observation_summary: Synthetic weekly logs show eye-strain score rising near posture-score changes, but screen exposure is not controlled.
packets.falsification_route: Compare against matched synthetic weeks where screen exposure changes without posture-score changes.
packets.next_executable_action: Generate paired control fixtures before hypothesis promotion.

packets.observation_summary: Synthetic animal-care entries show eye-appearance score improving after longer rest windows.
packets.falsification_route: Check whether eye-appearance score improves in rest windows without reduced stress or medication-timing changes.
packets.next_executable_action: Route through animal evidence router and contradiction ledger before any claim promotion.

packets.observation_summary: Synthetic packet passes redaction but still carries unresolved missingness affecting collaborator interpretation.
packets.falsification_route: Block export-as-evidence unless missingness_count is zero or uncertainty status is explicit.
packets.next_executable_action: Add the packet to collaboration readiness validation as an uncertainty-export fixture.
